about.headline: About Us
about.p1: As a specialized material distributor based in Zell am See, we supply high-quality synthetic leather solutions to processors and B2B partners across Europe.
about.p2: Our portfolio is engineered for durability, surface precision, and superior processability — developed for professional automotive and interior applications.
about.p3: With local warehousing in Austria, we ensure short lead times, high availability, and maximum flexibility in order quantities.
